attacking_style: Rarely initiates sustained attacks; prefers tactical counter-attacks in final 3km or aggressive positioning for bonus seconds. Most effective following accelerations rather than creating them.
team_tactics: BORA-hansgrohe provides strong domestique support (MÜHLBERGER, MAJKA, FORMOLO observed) with late-climb pacing, but Buchmann often fails to capitalize on perfect positioning delivered by teammates.
terrain_preference: Excels on moderate gradients and gravel sectors (bridged to Bernal solo on gravel); struggles significantly on sustained 10%+ steep pitches where repeatedly dropped early.
vulnerability: Sustained steep gradients above 10% expose clear weakness (dropped in opening kilometers multiple times). Crash-prone in Grand Tours, abandoning or losing preparation twice. Cannot convert perfect team positioning into wins.
key_patterns: Repeatedly dropped early on sustained 10%+ gradients across multiple Grand Tours
Strong time trial capability for a climber, beating pure climbers like Pinot
Excellent positioning and following wheels, but rarely converts to podium finishes
Crash disruptions: abandoned 2021 Giro while 6th GC, crashed out 2020 Dauphine while 3rd
Performs better on gravel/variable terrain than pure steep climbing
Willing to spend energy for marginal gains via bonus second attempts
form_trajectory: negative: Recent 2022-2023 observations show being dropped on steep climbs earlier than peak 2019 period, suggesting declining ability on hardest gradients
